overall.description: A cinematic third-person game sequence set in a futuristic hydroponics laboratory aboard a spacecraft or space station. Characters explore an industrial interior illuminated by green grow lights from plant cultivation towers, featuring metal grating floors and circular airlock doorways.

scene_state.functional_zone: hydroponics bay with illuminated grow towers

agents.ego_description: approaching the hydroponics equipment while observing the grow towers and laboratory setup

notable_agents.action: woman standing still examining the hydroponics grow tower

entered.detail: tall cylindrical cultivation unit with green internal lighting and transparent panels
large circular metal doorway with hydraulic hinges leading to adjacent section
metal table with scientific equipment and yellow storage containers
industrial metal flooring with drainage grates

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit hydroponics laboratory bathed in green light from grow towers. A woman stands examining the cultivation equipment while the camera slowly pans to reveal more of the industrial interior, including a circular airlock doorway and workbenches with scientific apparatus.

scene_state.functional_zone: central lab area with multiple grow towers

events.description: camera pans left to reveal additional laboratory space and approaching characters
ego character stops to face two NPCs near the center of the room

agents.ego_description: approaching and facing two other characters in the center of the hydroponics bay

notable_agents.action: woman turning to face the approaching player character
man standing and facing the player character near the grow towers

entered.detail: second illuminated cultivation unit visible in the background beyond the primary tower
bundle of industrial pipes and cables running along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera reveals a wider view of the laboratory as the player character approaches two NPCs standing between the grow towers. The group faces each other briefly in the green-lit space, with industrial piping visible along the walls and the workbench now prominent on the left.

events.description: group begins walking together toward the rear grow towers and airlock

agents.ego_description: walking through the lab following a male NPC while a female NPC walks alongside to the right

notable_agents.action: man walking ahead toward the rear grow towers

entered.detail: pair of illuminated cultivation units at the back of the laboratory chamber
yellow and black storage container with hazard markings

segments.scene_description: The group moves together toward the rear of the hydroponics bay, passing additional grow towers and equipment crates. The camera follows from behind as they approach the back wall, with the circular airlock door now visible to the right and industrial piping running along the nearby wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit hydroponics laboratory that shifts from a focused study of equipment to a wider exploration of the industrial bay. It begins with a slow pan across a woman examining cultivation equipment, revealing a green-lit interior filled with scientific apparatus and a circular airlock doorway. As the camera expands its view, the perspective shifts to follow the player character approaching two NPCs standing between towering grow lights and industrial piping. The scene then transitions into a trailing shot as the group moves together toward the rear of the bay, passing equipment crates and additional cultivation towers. Finally, the camera follows them toward the back wall, keeping the circular airlock and wall-mounted piping in view as they reach the end of the laboratory.
